member.name: T:Utility.My.Resources.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:Utility.My.Resources.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:Utility.My.Resources.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: M:Utility.Utility.DeepCopy``1(``0)
member.summary: this functions will be used for creating deep copy of objects

member.name: M:Utility.Utility.GetSystemConfigurationValue(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Data.SqlClient.SqlTransaction)
member.summary: Function to get system configuration value directly from database instead of collections
member.param: System configuration Key for which value require
System will get directly from database and will not filter from collection
member.returns: Value for the specified key will be return as string
member.remarks: New function to get system configuration value directly from database instead of collections.

member.name: M:Utility.Utility.GetSystemConfigurationValue(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Function to get system configuration value directly from database instead of collections
member.param: System configuration Key for which value require
Connection string to get directly from database and will not filter from collection
member.returns: Value for the specified key will be return as string
member.remarks: New function to get system configuration value directly from database instead of collections.

member.summary: ''' CR # 7258 this fucuntion will return weather is there any shop having isShowTagPrice flag is on
member.remarks: This function would be calling from multiple locations so thats why written in common location

members.member: CR#5557 Farooq-H Event log:replace event log enteries with database table wherever it is used in candela applica Here we gave the information about The key name i.e it can be the event log name it will be used for the information which we want to save as a message like we save message in event log This function will be used where we want to make event log in candela and alse we will replace the existing Event log with this funtion CR Desc: Event log:replace event log enteries with database table wherever it is used in candela Also change the reports which build from event log

member.name: M:Utility.Utility.GetSystemEventLog(System.String,System.String)
